title: The Boiled One: Reimagined
description: Horror mod that add "The Boiled One" created by Doctor Nowhere
body:
# **THE BOILED ONE**

This horror mod adds a "The Boiled One" into Minecraft 1.19.2 & 1.20.1 that hunts you down. He is an entity with a custom AI system and his highly configurable. This entity was created by the YouTuber Doctor Nowhere.

![Requires Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ca5a665901cb64bbe9dc9f5733c052ff22f84ba_0.webp)

# **What does he do?**
- Stalk the player if he's not attacking, if the player leaves his sight of 120 blocks he will teleport closer 7 will move slightly towards player.
- After a while of stalking, he will either choose to attack the player, scare the player (runs up then despawns) or just despawn.
- Configurable chance to watch you sleep, he will move closer to the bed until he is on top of it and wakes the player giving them paralysis, unless they leave the bed in which he will despawn.
- Spawn blood rain around the player in which they receive paralysis.

# **What is configurable?**
- Time delay between spawns [default 6000 in-game ticks]
- Daytime spawning [default is FALSE]
- Minumum & Maximum time delay between The Boiled One spawning & him attacking you [default min: 800, max 1400 in-game ticks]
- Attack damage dealt by The Boiled One to the player [default is 200]
- Blood Rain probability [default 5000, the higher the number, the rarer it is]
- Despawn When attacking timer [default min 800 & max 1200]
- Spawn Chance [default 4000, the higher the number is the rarer he'll spawn after the delay timer]
- Step height addition [default 10, number of additional blocks The Boiled One can climb]
- Watch player sleep [default 0.2, Min 0.0 & Max 1.0, 0.2 would be 20% chance when you sleep]
- Paralysis timer after The Boiled One wakes player [Default 300 in-game ticks]


The config file can be found in the "serverconfig" folder in your game save.

Info & Credits:
- Use command "/the_boiled_one spawn_delay get" to see how many ticks have passed for The Boiled One's spawn delay.
- Use command "/the_boiled_one spawn_delay set [number]" to set how many ticks have passed for The Boiled One's spawn delay.
- Mod based on "The Boiled One Phenomenon" by [Doctor Nowhere](https://www.youtube.com/@doctornowhere).
- Mod was created using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/), a mod-making tool by Pylo.
- I only release downloads of my mods via [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/hqrvester/projects), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Hqrvester) and [my website](https://hqrvester.jimdofree.com/minecraft/), please do not download from anywhere else as they may contain viruses!!
